home.subtitle: A clear, fast video community frontend for creators. This Nuxt 4 prototype uses mock data for the future Go API.

appearance.title: Reset Appearance Settings
appearance.description: Restore appearance, palette, background parameters, and size units from the current active build configuration. The browser-saved background image will be cleared.

preference.title: Reset Preference Settings
preference.description: Restore data mode, browsing, route progress, reveal motion, scrolling, privacy, and focus settings from the current active build configuration.

language.title: Reset Language Settings
language.description: Restore the interface language from the current active build configuration and apply it immediately.

form.title: Form
form.description: Tune density, size, corners, contrast, and navigation emphasis across Aoi.
form.densityDescription: Controls page spacing and settings row rhythm.
form.sizeDescription: Adjusts base type, control height, and navigation icon scale.
form.shapeDescription: Layers corner radius across controls, choices, and content surfaces.
form.contrastDescription: Raises legibility for text, borders, and selected states.
form.colorfulNavDescription: Lightly tints side and mobile navigation with the current accent color.

specUnits.title: Primary size units
specUnits.description: Manage the source dimensions used to derive spacing, controls, navigation, grids, and rounded corners.

baseFont.title: Base type
baseFont.description: Feeds body text and heading scale.
baseFont.label: Base font size

space.title: Spacing unit
space.description: Feeds page padding, panel rhythm, and compact gaps.
space.label: Base spacing

radius.title: Corner unit
radius.description: Feeds surface, card, control, and choice radii.
radius.label: Base corner radius

controlHeight.title: Control height
controlHeight.description: Feeds buttons, fields, icon buttons, and navigation actions.
controlHeight.label: Base control height

contentMaxWidth.title: Content width
contentMaxWidth.description: Sets normal page width with either a fluid percentage or a fixed pixel cap.
contentMaxWidth.label: Content width

contentWideMaxWidth.title: Wide content width
contentWideMaxWidth.description: Sets settings and workspace page width with either a fluid percentage or a fixed pixel cap.
contentWideMaxWidth.label: Wide content width

railWidth.title: Desktop rail
railWidth.description: Sets the fixed side navigation width.
railWidth.label: Desktop rail width

mobileNavHeight.title: Mobile navigation
mobileNavHeight.description: Sets mobile header, bottom navigation, and safe page padding.
mobileNavHeight.label: Mobile nav height

videoGridMinCardWidth.title: Video grid card
videoGridMinCardWidth.description: Sets the minimum card column width on desktop grids.
videoGridMinCardWidth.label: Video card min width

settingsCardMinWidth.title: Settings card
settingsCardMinWidth.description: Sets the minimum settings card and control column width.
settingsCardMinWidth.label: Settings card min width

palette.title: Accent color
palette.description: Choose a preset palette or switch to a custom color.

routeProgress.title: Route progress bar
routeProgress.description: Use NProgress for route navigation feedback while keeping Nuxt's built-in loading lifecycle.
routeProgress.enabledDescription: Show a slim loading bar during page navigation.
routeProgress.trickleDescription: Let NProgress slowly advance while the next page is still loading.
routeProgress.spinnerDescription: Display the optional NProgress spinner in the top-right corner.
routeProgress.easingDescription: Choose the transition curve used by the progress bar.

reveal.title: Reveal motion
reveal.description: Tune how content panels, cards, and lists pop into view while browsing.
reveal.enabledDescription: Turn off to keep reveal-enabled content immediately visible.
reveal.effectDescription: Choose whether each module keeps its local effect or uses one global style.
reveal.replayDescription: Control whether reveal motion repeats when content re-enters the viewport.

scroll.title: Scroll experience
scroll.description: Control global smooth scrolling, magnetic snapping, opt-in scroll scenes, and edge damping.

scrollbar.strategyDescription: Choose whether the page reserves scrollbar space to prevent Windows-style layout shifts.

smooth.enabledDescription: Use Lenis to soften wheel-driven page scrolling while preserving native touch inertia.

snap.enabledDescription: Allow Aoi scroll areas and scenes to settle on nearby items or sections.
snap.modeDescription: Choose a softer proximity snap or a stricter mandatory snap.

hijack.enabledDescription: Let explicit Aoi scroll scenes capture large wheel or keyboard steps and jump section by section.
hijack.modeDescription: Choose whether a scene follows its current section or recalculates the nearest section before moving.

rubberBand.enabledDescription: Show a small rubber-band response at page and scroll-area edges.

developerUnlock.hint: Click the Aoi mark 4 times to enable Developer Mode.
developerUnlock.remaining: {count} more clicks to enter Developer Mode.
developerUnlock.enabled: Developer Mode is enabled. The Developer page is now available in Settings.
developerUnlock.logoLabel: Aoi product mark, click four times to enable Developer Mode

developer.title: Developer
developer.description: Generate build-time default app settings and write the controlled source config in local development.

locked.title: Developer Mode is locked
locked.description: Open the About page and use the hidden Aoi mark interaction to enable Developer Mode.

status.title: Build defaults
status.description: This page only writes the active default config. The original backup config is never modified.

generated.title: Generated preview
generated.description: Generate TypeScript config from the current app settings. Developer Mode, background files, and local content data are excluded.

source.title: Source config actions
source.description: Write overwrites the active default config. Restore regenerates it from the original backup.
source.devNote: The write API is available only on the local dev server and accepts only a fixed allowlist settings object.
source.productionNote: This is not the local dev server, so source writes and restores are disabled.

messages.refreshed: Preview regenerated from the current app settings.
messages.restored: Active defaults were restored from the original backup.

errors.copy: Copy failed. Select the preview text directly instead.
errors.write: Write failed. Make sure this is the local dev server.
errors.restore: Restore failed. Make sure this is the local dev server.

profiles.confirmBeforeApply: Profile writes and applies must show a diff preview and confirmation.
profiles.buildDescription: Build presets use one JSON file per profile and keep a matching original backup.
profiles.runtimeDescription: Runtime profiles are stored only in the current browser and can be imported or exported.
profiles.backgroundReferenceNote: Background profiles save references only, never image bytes.

experimental.title: Experiments
experimental.description: Try reusable interface patterns before they move into product flows.

lightbox.title: Lightbox gallery
lightbox.description: Preview the reusable Aoi lightbox with images, video controls, thumbnails, keyboard navigation, and touch gestures.

sunflower.title: Sunflower interface study
sunflower.description: A warm image placeholder for checking zoom, pan, captions, and thumbnail focus.

sakura.title: Sakura accent frame
sakura.description: A softer image item for testing color balance inside the dark lightbox surface.

video.title: Local video preview
video.description: The bundled sample video exercises custom playback, seek, volume, mute, and fullscreen controls.

night.title: Night mode contrast
night.description: A darker image placeholder for checking caption contrast and reduced-motion behavior.

scrollDemo.title: Scroll system demo
scrollDemo.description: A compact scene for checking smooth scrolling, magnetic snapping, scroll hijacking, and edge damping together.

smooth.title: Inertial page motion
smooth.description: Wheel input eases into place through the global Lenis runtime when smooth scrolling is enabled.

snap.title: Magnetic sections
snap.description: Each panel is a snap target, so the scene can settle on the nearest useful reading position.

hijack.title: Opt-in scene control
hijack.description: When scene hijacking is enabled, large wheel and keyboard steps move one panel at a time.

richText.title: Rich text editor
richText.description: Draft Markdown-first rich content while preserving the full Tiptap document as a fallback contract.
richText.placeholder: Write a creator note, release plan, or formatted description...
richText.supportingText: Markdown is the primary text output; JSON preserves styles Markdown cannot express.
richText.sample:
# Aoi rich text draft

Use **Markdown** shortcuts or the toolbar to shape content.

- Keep the Markdown output readable
- Preserve colors, tables, alignment, and other rich details in JSON
- Reject unsafe links and image URLs

> This panel is an isolated experiment and does not change upload drafts or comments yet.

player.subtitle: Subtitles
player.loadInterruptedDescription: The video payload could not be loaded.
player.danmakuPlaceholder: Send a friendly danmaku for this moment

errors.dash: The DASH stream failed to load.
errors.hls: The HLS stream failed to load.
errors.noSource: No playable video source is available.
errors.unsupportedFormat: This video format is not supported by the current browser.
errors.unsupportedHls: HLS playback is not supported by the current browser.
